parsed.generic_mechanism: Exact textual duplication produces parity: when candidates use the same claims, emotional leverage, and instructions, textual evidence cannot support a difference in method integrity.

paraphrased_evidence.A: A consistently absolves readers and presents changed beliefs as eliminating desire, yet it uses sweeping claims about dependence, diet, withdrawal, and disease, vivid catastrophic outcomes, and unverified clinic-scale success assertions.
paraphrased_evidence.B: B supplies the same method and evidence as A: reader blame is rejected and endurance is disavowed, while medical certainty, catastrophe-led persuasion, and unsupported efficacy testimony remain central.

paraphrased_evidence.ours: A consistently absolves readers and presents changed beliefs as eliminating desire, yet it uses sweeping claims about dependence, diet, withdrawal, and disease, vivid catastrophic outcomes, and unverified clinic-scale success assertions.
paraphrased_evidence.ref: B supplies the same method and evidence as A: reader blame is rejected and endurance is disavowed, while medical certainty, catastrophe-led persuasion, and unsupported efficacy testimony remain central.
